$schema_note: Iter-6 snapshot fixture — source-of-record for wc (working-capital) inputs cited by domestic services risk-factor profiles. The profile's source.ref points here; profile inputs MIRROR this file's data block.
applies_to_note: US services sector. V1 inline WC values (30bps base / 50bps peak) carried forward as illustrative domestic baseline. For services the relevant working-capital driver is closer to payroll/AR cycles than inventory.

source.citation: V1 inline WC values (30bps base / 50bps peak) carried forward as illustrative domestic baseline.
source.retrieval_method: manual transcription from V1 SWAPS-1LOAN scenario configs
source.live_binding_target: FRED ISRATIO + sector inventory-to-sales (Iter-7+); for services, payroll/AR cycle indicators are the relevant driver
